TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Anthony Bowie sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1963, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 11, Anthony Bowie, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Anthony Bowie htagan beh sa Tulsa,Oklahoma. 2003 kawas maki Bishop Moore High School's pcbaq seto. qyanux nya hopa pqwasan biru Anthony Bowie tmasot gocyu pqwasan biru lga,1982-1984 kawas maki Seminole State mzyu mari,1984-1986 kawas maki Oklahoma mzyu mari. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: antħonj βowie s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, antħonj βowie, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja antħonj βowie ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa tuls~ɕa,oklaħoma. **** kawas~ɕ maki βis~ɕħop moore ħiɣħ s~ɕʦ~ʨħoolʔs~ɕ pʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕeto. qjanux nja ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru antħonj βowie tmas~ɕot ɣoʦ~ʨju pqwas~ɕan βiru lɣa,****-**** kawas~ɕ maki s~ɕeminole s~ɕtate mzju mari,****-**** kawas~ɕ maki oklaħoma mzju mari. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Anthony Bowie sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1963, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 11, Anthony Bowie, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Anthony Bowie htagan beh sa Tulsa,Oklahoma. 2003 kawas maki Bishop Moore High School's pcbaq seto. qyanux nya hopa pqwasan biru Anthony Bowie tmasot gocyu pqwasan biru lga,1982-1984 kawas maki Seminole State mzyu mari,1984-1986 kawas maki Oklahoma mzyu mari. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: antħonj βowie s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, antħonj βowie, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja antħonj βowie ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa tuls~ɕa,oklaħoma. **** kawas~ɕ maki βis~ɕħop moore ħiɣħ s~ɕʦ~ʨħoolʔs~ɕ pʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕeto. qjanux nja ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru antħonj βowie tmas~ɕot ɣoʦ~ʨju pqwas~ɕan βiru lɣa,****-**** kawas~ɕ maki s~ɕeminole s~ɕtate mzju mari,****-**** kawas~ɕ maki oklaħoma mzju mari. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
